Properties.Source:
-- SERVICES
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

-- REMOTE EVENT
local ShakeEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("ExplosionShake")

-- REFERENCES
local EggsFolder = script.Parent
local EggCombineComplete = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("EggCombineComplete")
local Egg1 = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("LuckBlock1")
local Egg2 = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("LuckBlock2")
local Egg3 = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("LuckBlock3")
local EggCombine = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("EggCombine")

local ExplosionPart = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("ExplosionPart")
local ExplosionSound = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("ExplosionSound")
local DragSound = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("DragSound")

local Panels = {
	EggsFolder:WaitForChild("Panel1"),
	EggsFolder:WaitForChild("Panel2"),
	EggsFolder:WaitForChild("Panel3")
}

local Dings = {
	EggsFolder:WaitForChild("Ding1"),
	EggsFolder:WaitForChild("Ding2"),
	EggsFolder:WaitForChild("Ding3")
}

local MainDing = EggsFolder:WaitForChild("MainDing")

-- SETTINGS
local PANEL_FADE = 0.12
local LIGHT_PULSE_UP = 0.08
local LIGHT_PULSE_DOWN = 0.06
local CONFIRM_FLASH = 0.15
local MOVE_TIME = 2.0
local BUSY = false

local COMBINE_ROTATION = CFrame.fromOrientation(math.rad(90), math.rad(-90), 0)

-- PREP PANELS
for _, panel in ipairs(Panels) do
	panel.Transparency = 1
	panel.CanCollide = false
	panel.Light1.Light.Enabled = false
	panel.Light1.Light.Brightness = 0
end

-------------------------------------------------
-- PANEL CHECK SEQUENCE
-------------------------------------------------
local function panelCheckSequence()
	-- Phase 1: individual flashes (fast)
	for i, panel in ipairs(Panels) do
		local light = panel.Light1.Light
		local ding = Dings[i]

		local fadeIn = TweenService:Create(panel, TweenInfo.new(PANEL_FADE), {Transparency = 0})
		fadeIn:Play()
		fadeIn.Completed:Wait()

		light.Enabled = true
		local pulseUp = TweenService:Create(light, TweenInfo.new(LIGHT_PULSE_UP), {Brightness = 6})
		pulseUp:Play()
		ding:Play()
		pulseUp.Completed:Wait()

		local pulseDown = TweenService:Create(light, TweenInfo.new(LIGHT_PULSE_DOWN), {Brightness = 0})
		pulseDown:Play()
		pulseDown.Completed:Wait()
		light.Enabled = false

		local fadeOut = TweenService:Create(panel, TweenInfo.new(PANEL_FADE), {Transparency = 1})
		fadeOut:Play()
		fadeOut.Completed:Wait()
	end

	-- Phase 2: confirmation flash (all together)
	-- Step 1: enable lights and transparency
	for _, panel in ipairs(Panels) do
		panel.Transparency = 0
		panel.Light1.Light.Enabled = true
	end

	-- Step 2: flash all lights (no waiting)
	for _, panel in ipairs(Panels) do
		local flash = TweenService:Create(panel.Light1.Light, TweenInfo.new(CONFIRM_FLASH), {Brightness = 8})
		flash:Play()
	end

	-- Step 3: immediately play MainDing while lights are animating
	MainDing:Play()

	-- Step 4: after small delay, fade panels and lights
	task.wait(CONFIRM_FLASH) -- let the flash show briefly
	for _, panel in ipairs(Panels) do
		local flashDown = TweenService:Create(panel.Light1.Light, TweenInfo.new(CONFIRM_FLASH), {Brightness = 0})
		flashDown:Play()
		panel.Light1.Light.Enabled = false

		local fadeOut = TweenService:Create(panel, TweenInfo.new(CONFIRM_FLASH), {Transparency = 1})
		fadeOut:Play()
	end

	-- Wait a little to make sure fade finishes
	task.wait(CONFIRM_FLASH + 0.05)
end

-------------------------------------------------
-- MAGNETIC PULL
-------------------------------------------------
local function magneticPull(model, targetCF)
	local startCF = model:GetPivot()
	local alpha = Instance.new("NumberValue")

	local conn
	conn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
		local t = alpha.Value
		local smoothT = t * t * (3 - 2 * t)
		local accelT = smoothT ^ 1.5
		local wobble = math.sin(accelT * math.pi * 4) * 0.06
		local spin = CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(120 * accelT), wobble)
		model:PivotTo(startCF:Lerp(targetCF, accelT) * spin)
	end)

	TweenService:Create(alpha, TweenInfo.new(MOVE_TIME), {Value = 1}):Play()
	task.wait(MOVE_TIME)
	conn:Disconnect()
end

-------------------------------------------------
-- EXPLOSION
-------------------------------------------------
local function explode(centerCF)
	ExplosionPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(centerCF.Position) * CFrame.fromOrientation(0, math.rad(-90), 0)
	ExplosionSound:Play()
	ShakeEvent:FireAllClients()

	for _, obj in ipairs(ExplosionPart:GetDescendants()) do
		if obj:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
			obj.Enabled = true
			obj:Emit(120)
		elseif obj:IsA("Beam") then
			obj.Enabled = true
		end
	end

	task.delay(0.5, function()
		for _, obj in ipairs(ExplosionPart:GetDescendants()) do
			if obj:IsA("ParticleEmitter") or obj:IsA("Beam") then
				obj.Enabled = false
			end
		end
	end)
end

-------------------------------------------------
-- MAIN SEQUENCE
-------------------------------------------------
local function combineEggs()
	if BUSY then return end
	BUSY = true
	local centerCF = Egg2:GetPivot()

	-- Panels ritual
	panelCheckSequence()

	-- Start drag sound & magnetic pull
	DragSound:Play()
	task.spawn(function() magneticPull(Egg1, centerCF) end)
	task.spawn(function() magneticPull(Egg3, centerCF) end)

	task.wait(MOVE_TIME)
	DragSound:Stop()

	-- Explosion
	explode(centerCF)

	-- Remove old eggs
	Egg1:Destroy()
	Egg2:Destroy()
	Egg3:Destroy()
	
	EggCombineComplete.Value = true

	-- Spawn combined egg
	EggCombine.Parent = EggsFolder
	EggCombine:PivotTo(CFrame.new(centerCF.Position) * COMBINE_ROTATION)
	
	task.delay(2.5, function()
		script.Parent:Destroy()
	end)
end

-------------------------------------------------
-- AUTO START
-------------------------------------------------
task.wait(0.5)
combineEggs()

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local folder = script.Parent
local sparksPart = folder:FindFirstChild("Break_Sparks")
local firePart = folder:FindFirstChild("Break_Fire")
local sound = folder:FindFirstChild("Break_Sound")
local enableSound = folder:FindFirstChild("Break_Enable") -- Enable sound in Break Button folder
local thruSound = folder:FindFirstChild("Break_Thru") -- Continuous red interval sound

-- Camera shake RemoteEvent (create in ReplicatedStorage)
local shakeEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("ShakeEvent")

-- === Sparks from Sparks Part (one-time) ===
local sparksEmitters = {}
if sparksPart then
	local endPart = sparksPart:FindFirstChild("End")
	if endPart then
		for _, v in pairs(endPart:GetDescendants()) do
			if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
				table.insert(sparksEmitters, v)
			end
		end
	end
end

-- === Fire VFX (Beam, Flame, Sparks2) ===
local fireVFX = {}
local sparks2Emitters = {}
if firePart then
	for _, v in pairs(firePart:GetDescendants()) do
		if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") or v:IsA("Beam") or v:IsA("Fire") then
			table.insert(fireVFX, v)
			-- Sparks2 specifically
			if v.Name == "Sparks2" and v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
				table.insert(sparks2Emitters, v)
			end
		end
	end
end

-- SETTINGS
local ANIM_TIME = 0.25          -- duration to move in/out
local PRESS_HOLD = 2             -- seconds to stay pressed
local RED_DURATION = 10          -- seconds to stay red
local SHAKE_INTENSITY = 2
local SHAKE_DURATION = 0.3

-- Save original state
local buttonPressed = false

local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(ANIM_TIME, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)

-- Function to enable/disable Fire VFX
local function enableFire(enabled)
	if fireVFX then
		for _, v in pairs(fireVFX) do
			if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") or v:IsA("Fire") then
				v.Enabled = enabled
			elseif v:IsA("Beam") then
				v.Enabled = enabled
			end
		end
	end
end

-- Function to emit Sparks from Sparks Part (one-time)
local function emitSparks()
	if sparksEmitters then
		for _, emitter in pairs(sparksEmitters) do
			emitter:Emit(10) -- emit 10 particles immediately
		end
	end
end

-- Function to enable/disable Sparks2 during red interval
local function toggleSparks2(enabled)
	if sparks2Emitters then
		for _, emitter in pairs(sparks2Emitters) do
			emitter.Enabled = enabled
		end
	end
end

-- CLICK FUNCTION
local function onClicked(player)
	if buttonPressed then return end
	buttonPressed = true

	-- Play click sound
	if sound then sound:Play() end

	-- Camera shake
	shakeEvent:FireClient(player, SHAKE_INTENSITY, SHAKE_DURATION)

	-- Enable Fire VFX (all effects)
	enableFire(true)

	-- Emit Sparks once at press
	emitSparks()

	-- Enable Sparks2 to play continuously during red interval
	toggleSparks2(true)

	-- Start Thru sound if exists
	if thruSound then
		thruSound:Play()
	end

	buttonPressed = false
end

folder:WaitForChild("Trigger").Event:Connect(function(
	isStateNormal: boolean, TurnOn: boolean?, player: Player?)
	if isStateNormal then
		return
	end

	if TurnOn then
		-- Disable Fire VFX and Sparks2
		enableFire(false)
		toggleSparks2(false)

		-- Stop Thru sound
		if thruSound then
			thruSound:Stop()
		end

		-- Play Enable sound
		if enableSound then
			enableSound:Play()
		end
	else
		onClicked(player)
	end
end)

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

-- === REFERENCES ===
local folder = script.Parent
local buttonPart = folder
local vfxPart = folder:WaitForChild("vfxpart1")
local sound = folder:FindFirstChild("Sound")

-- SECOND VFX: Sparks --> End --> Sparks
local sparksPart = folder:FindFirstChild("Sparks")
local sparksEmitter
if sparksPart then
	local endPart = sparksPart:FindFirstChild("End")
	if endPart then
		sparksEmitter = endPart:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ParticleEmitter", true)
	end
end

-- ParticleEmitter references (do NOT change properties)
local particles = vfxPart:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ParticleEmitter", true)

-- === SETTINGS ===
local PRESS_DISTANCE = 0.08
local ANIM_TIME = 0.35     -- slightly slower for smoother motion
local PRESS_HOLD = 0.05
local debounce = false

-- TARGET POSITION (for button direction)
local TARGET_POSITION = Vector3.new(-415.448, 7.64, 117.78)

-- Save original state
local originalPosition = buttonPart.Position
local originalCFrame = buttonPart.CFrame

-- Use Back easing for more natural press & release
local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
	ANIM_TIME,
	Enum.EasingStyle.Back,
	Enum.EasingDirection.Out
)

-- === CLICK FUNCTION ===
local function onClicked()
	if debounce then return end
	debounce = true

	-- Play sound
	if sound then
		sound:Play()
	end

	-- Spawn first VFX once
	if particles then
		particles:Emit(1)
	end

	-- Spawn sparks VFX once
	if sparksEmitter then
		sparksEmitter:Emit(8)
	end

	-- Move button toward target
	local direction = (TARGET_POSITION - originalPosition).Unit
	local pressedPosition = originalPosition + (direction * PRESS_DISTANCE)
	local pressedCFrame = CFrame.new(pressedPosition) * originalCFrame.Rotation

	local pressTween = TweenService:Create(buttonPart, tweenInfo, {CFrame = pressedCFrame})
	pressTween:Play()
	pressTween.Completed:Wait()

	task.wait(PRESS_HOLD)

	-- Smooth return using same easing
	local returnTween = TweenService:Create(buttonPart, tweenInfo, {CFrame = originalCFrame})
	returnTween:Play()
	returnTween.Completed:Wait()

	debounce = false
end

folder:WaitForChild("Trigger").Event:Connect(function(stateIsNormal: boolean?)
	if stateIsNormal then
		onClicked()
	end
end)
